はい、よろしい。
基礎総括としては十分なレベルね。

それでは、これにて本特訓は完了。
第三段階まで来た人は久しぶりね。

でも、これはまだ始まり。

また私の

Very good.
You have a firm grasp of the fundamentals.

That concludes this round of boot camp.
It's been a while since I've seen anyone
make it through the third level.

This is only the beginning, though.
Come see me when you're ready for
the next step.
